title: Interior Fit-Outs
tagline: Turnkey interiors, built to brand standard
description: Complete interior fit-outs for guest rooms, lobbies, F&B and back-of-house, delivered to operator specifications, on schedule, and with minimal disruption to live operations.

title: Waterproofing
description: Membrane and coating systems for terraces, bathrooms, basements, podiums and swimming pools, engineered to withstand heavy footfall and constant wet exposure.

title: Painting & Finishes
description: Decorative and protective painting, from premium interior emulsions and textures to exterior and industrial coatings, applied to a hospitality-grade finish.

title: Surface Polishing
tagline: Mirror finishes for stone, floors & decks
description: Diamond polishing and restoration for marble, granite and concrete, plus deck and poolside surfaces, restoring shine, gloss and slip-safe texture.

title: Flooring
description: Supply and installation of premium floor coverings: broadloom and tiled carpet, luxury vinyl, engineered and solid wood, matched to traffic, acoustics and design intent.

title: Glass Films
description: Architectural window films that cut heat and glare, add privacy and frosting, and improve safety, professionally applied to glazing, partitions and facades.

title: Window Blinds
description: Made-to-measure blinds and shades: roller, roman, venetian and motorised systems for light control, privacy and a clean, contemporary look.
